sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Lindblad (NASDAQ: LIND) details 2026 virtual meeting, director votes, pay
feed.summary: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIND) has released details for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, which will be held virtually on June 10, 2026. Shareholders will vote on the election of four Class B directors, an advisory resolution concerning 2025 executive compensation, and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor for 2026. The proxy statement also provides comprehensive information on the board's structure, committee responsibilities, director and executive compensation, and principal stockholders.

feed.title: R Squared Ltd Invests $643,000 in Teradyne, Inc. $TER

feed.title: Travelers to expand homeowners coverage in California
feed.summary: Travelers has announced its participation in California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy, signaling its intent to expand homeowners insurance availability across the state. This move is linked to the strategy's goal of increasing coverage by allowing insurers to use forward-looking wildfire models and factor reinsurance costs into rates. The decision comes amidst California's ongoing homeowners' insurance crisis, exacerbated by recent wildfires, and follows similar announcements from other insurers.

feed.title: Teledyne FLIR Certifies Emesent Hovermap LiDAR | TDY Stock News
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR Defense has expanded its Third-Party Payload Integration Program by certifying Emesent’s Hovermap LiDAR payload. This integration will provide GPS-denied 3D-mapping capabilities across Teledyne FLIR's unmanned systems and radiation detection platforms, enhancing awareness in complex and hazardous environments. The technology, unveiled at Modern Day Marine 2026, allows operators to map spaces and detect radiation levels in real-time without risking human safety.

feed.title: Teledyne FLIR Defense Grows Third-Party Payload Integration Program, Adds Emesent Hovermap LiDAR for Unmanned Air, Ground, and Detection Platforms
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR Defense has expanded its Third-Party Payload Integration Program by certifying Emesent's Hovermap LiDAR Payload. This integration provides GPS-denied 3D-mapping capabilities across Teledyne FLIR’s unmanned aerial systems, ground robots, and radiation detection platforms, enhancing situational awareness in complex and hazardous environments. The partnership aims to deliver fused, spatial pictures of threat environments, particularly for CBRN missions, by combining mapping with radiation detection.

feed.title: Incyte lines up 4 drug launches after $1.27B revenue quarter
feed.summary: Incyte reported robust financial results for Q1 2026, with total revenue reaching $1.27 billion, a 21% increase year-over-year, driven by strong sales across its product portfolio including Jakafi and Opzelura. The company anticipates four new product approvals and launches within the next 12 months and is advancing its late-stage pipeline with 10 Phase 3 studies underway. Key highlights include positive Phase 3 results for povorcitinib in nonsegmental vitiligo and the NDA acceptance for povorcitinib in hidradenitis suppurativa.

feed.title: Seaport Global Adjusts Price Target on ONEOK to $95 From $98, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Seaport Global has adjusted its price target for ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) from $98 to $95, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This update comes as other analysts have also recently modified their price targets for ONEOK, with some increasing and others maintaining their ratings. ONEOK also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.07 per share, payable on May 15, 2026.

feed.title: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA Raises Stock Holdings in Gen Digital Inc. $GEN
feed.summary: Pictet Asset Management Holding SA significantly increased its stake in Gen Digital Inc. by 32.4% in the fourth quarter, now owning 4,156,668 shares valued at $113 million. Gen Digital recently reported quarterly earnings that beat estimates and announced a quarterly dividend, while several analysts have issued "Hold" ratings with a consensus target price of $31.86.

feed.title: Two new AI data-center deals helped lift Corning sales 18%
feed.summary: Corning Inc. reported a strong first quarter in 2026, with core sales growing 18% to $4.35 billion and core EPS increasing 30% to $0.70, driven by robust demand for Gen AI products and solar. The company secured two new hyperscale customer agreements for AI data centers, similar in size and duration to its $6 billion Meta deal. Corning plans to further expand its "Springboard" plan through 2030 and introduce a new Photonics Market-Access Platform at its upcoming investor event.

feed.title: Kandi ended 2025 with $211.9M cash despite a 31.5% revenue drop
feed.summary: Kandi Technologies (NASDAQ: KNDI) reported a 31.5% decrease in full-year 2025 net revenue to $87.4 million, with a net loss widening to $95.6 million. Despite this, the company significantly improved its gross margin to 42.6% and maintained a strong liquidity position, ending the year with $211.9 million in cash and generating $96.8 million in net cash from operations. Kandi also announced strategic partnerships for battery swap station equipment and autonomous security robots, signaling a shift towards a technology-driven platform company.

feed.title: LGI Homes, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Raises Full Year Margin Guidance
feed.summary: LGI Homes, Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, exceeding expectations with home closings of 916 and an adjusted gross margin of 23.4%. The company also raised its full-year 2026 gross margin guidance to between 18.5% and 20.5% and adjusted gross margin guidance to between 22.0% and 24.0%, citing strong execution and market confidence. These results highlight LGI Homes' disciplined approach to pricing and inventory management, bolstered by a self-developed land pipeline.

feed.title: Insulet to Participate in BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation, a leader in tubeless insulin pump technology, announced its participation in the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference. Management will present on May 13, 2026, at 9:20 a.m. Pacific Time, with a live webcast and replay available on the Insulet Investor Relations website. The company specializes in the Omnipod Insulin Management System, offering an innovative alternative for insulin delivery and leveraging its technology for other subcutaneous drug deliveries.

feed.title: American Tower lifts 2026 targets; first-quarter revenue hits $2.74B
feed.summary: American Tower Corporation reported a strong start to 2026, with first-quarter total revenue increasing by 6.8% to $2.74 billion and net income jumping 76.2% to $879 million. The company has raised its full-year 2026 outlook for property revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and AFFO, citing positive foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations and accelerating straight-line revenue in Latin America. American Tower's CEO, Steve Vondran, highlighted the strengthening structural growth drivers of their business, including rising mobile data consumption and the expansion of AI-driven workloads.

feed.title: Hilton shares fall 2% on weak full-year guidance despite Q1 beat
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) saw its shares fall over 2% in pre-market trading despite reporting Q1 earnings that beat analyst expectations. The dip was primarily due to the company's full-year adjusted EPS guidance of $8.79 to $8.91, which fell below the consensus estimate of $9.05. Although revenue missed slightly, RevPAR increased, and the company plans to return $3.5 billion to shareholders for the full year.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc. stock (US09259E1082): Is private credit growth strong enough to unlock sustained upside?
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. is leveraging its private credit business as a primary growth driver, appealing to investors seeking higher yields in a low-rate environment. The firm's scale and diversified alternative asset management model, including permanent capital vehicles, provide stability and potential for long-term returns. While competitive advantages are strong, investors should be mindful of execution risks, interest rate sensitivities, and regulatory scrutiny on private markets.

feed.title: Scotiabank Has Optimistic Outlook of FANG FY2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Scotiabank has significantly increased its FY2026 EPS estimate for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) to $18.60 per share, up from $5.80, and maintains a "Sector Outperform" rating with a $195.00 price target. This optimistic revised forecast contrasts with the company's recent Q4 2025 earnings where they missed analyst estimates. Diamondback Energy also announced an increased quarterly dividend and experienced notable insider selling activity totaling over $2 million in sales from two directors.

feed.title: eBay Inc. stock (US2786421030): Is its marketplace model still strong enough to drive investor retur
feed.summary: This article analyzes eBay Inc.'s current business model and its ability to drive investor returns amidst a competitive e-commerce landscape. It highlights eBay's core marketplace model, revenue streams, global reach, and competitive positioning, emphasizing its strength in the resale economy and value-oriented consumer segments. The piece also discusses analyst views, potential risks, and key metrics investors should monitor, positioning eBay as a steady, cash-generative asset for diversified portfolios.

feed.title: Coca-Cola's Q1 revenue up by 12% to $12.5B, tops estimates
feed.summary: Coca-Cola announced a robust first quarter, with revenue increasing by 12% to $12.5 billion. This performance exceeded analyst estimates, indicating strong financial health for the beverage giant.

feed.title: Coca-Cola lifts full-year targets after Q1 EPS rose 18% to $0.91
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company reported a strong start to 2026 with an 18% increase in EPS to $0.91 and a 12% rise in net revenues to $12.5 billion for Q1. The company also updated its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting organic revenue growth of 4% to 5% and comparable EPS growth of 8% to 9%. This performance is attributed to focus on consumers, local execution, and effective revenue growth management strategies.

feed.title: Pentair (NYSE: PNR) eliminates pool CEO role, expands Wiggins
feed.summary: Pentair plc announced significant leadership changes, eliminating the Chief Executive Officer, Pool role following Jerome O. Pedretti's resignation, effective July 1, 2026. The company appointed De’Mon L. Wiggins, previously Executive Vice President and President, Flow and Water Solutions, to an expanded role overseeing Flow, Water Solutions, and Pool, consolidating leadership under a single executive. This strategic move aims to streamline organizational structure, with Pedretti receiving severance benefits.

feed.title: Pentair (PNR) lifts 2026 EPS guidance after Q1 margin and earnings growth
feed.summary: Pentair (PNR) reported a strong first quarter in 2026, with sales up 3% and adjusted EPS increasing 10% to $1.22, driven by improved margins across all segments. The company raised its full-year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance to $4.83–$4.93 and adjusted EPS guidance to $5.30–$5.40, reflecting cautious optimism and continued focus on its resilient water portfolio. Pentair also continued its shareholder returns, repurchasing $200 million in shares and extending its dividend increase streak to 50 consecutive years.

feed.title: Pentair Announces Leadership Transition for Pentair Pool
feed.summary: Pentair plc announced a leadership transition for its Pool segment. Jerome Pedretti, Executive Vice President and Chief Executive Officer of Pentair Pool, will depart the company effective July 1, 2026, after more than two decades of service. De’Mon Wiggins will assume responsibility for the Pool segment, in addition to his current roles as EVP and President of Pentair Flow and Pentair Water Solutions, effective April 28, 2026.
